title: Stale Upgrade Guidance Removal
goal: Implement #480 by removing ordinary host-repo upgrade guidance that tells agents to run helper scripts absent from default installs.
non_goals: Do not reintroduce helper scripts into default planning installs.
Do not remove package-local debugging CLIs.
Do not redesign generated static adapter headers in this slice unless they are ordinary upgrade guidance.

intent.outcome: Bootstrap-upgrade guidance uses root agentic-workspace upgrade first and package-local CLIs only as fallback/debugging.
intent.constraints: Keep package shipped guidance repo-/tool-/language-agnostic; do not depend on host repos having monorepo maintainer scripts.
intent.latitude: Patch installed/package skill docs and add a narrow regression test.
intent.escalation: Escalate if the fix requires regenerating broad adapter payloads or changing lifecycle command behavior.

execution.next_step: Archive this plan, commit, push, close #480, refresh evidence, then promote the next lifecycle child issue.
execution.proof: planning installer tests, planning-surface checks, proof selector, closeout

invariants: Host-repo upgrade guidance starts with root agentic-workspace upgrade --dry-run.
Package-local bootstrap CLIs remain documented as fallback/debug surfaces.
Default installs are not expected to contain monorepo maintainer helper scripts.

required_continuation.activation trigger: after #480 closeout, promote the next lifecycle child issue

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: The root-upgrade front door from #479 no longer competes with stale planning skill instructions.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: #481 fixture matrix, #482 plan action classification, #483 destructive lifecycle refusal coverage, and #484 legacy machinery removal.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: Generated static adapter headers still mention render_agent_docs.py as a source-checkout regeneration path, but they are not bootstrap-upgrade guidance; keep that separate from #480 unless a future issue targets generated-adapter header wording.
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: #481 lifecycle fixture matrix unless reingestion reprioritizes.

context_budget.live working set: state, this execplan, #480/#478 issue bodies, bootstrap-upgrade skill docs, planning installer tests
context_budget.recoverable later: full external evidence and historical archives
context_budget.externalize before shift: update execution_run, validation_commands, proof_report, intent_satisfaction, and closure_check
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Active issue is #480 stale upgrade guidance.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Before editing generated adapters or lifecycle command behavior.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Replace stale planning upgrade guidance with current lifecycle path.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Dogfood package surfaces; commit/push milestone; close issue only after proof.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The slice expands into broad adapter regeneration or lifecycle behavior changes.

immediate_next_action: Archive, commit, push, close #480, refresh evidence, and promote the next lifecycle child issue.
proof_expectations: uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed <changed paths> --format json
cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py
cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .

validation_commands.command: Set-Location packages/planning; uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py -q -k "bootstrap_upgrade_skill or contract_file_shortlist"
Set-Location packages/planning; uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py
Set-Location packages/planning; uv run ruff check .

validation_commands.result: pass: remaining references are regression assertions only

validation_commands.command: uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/skills/bootstrap-upgrade/SKILL.md packages/planning/skills/bootstrap-upgrade/SKILL.md packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/stale-upgrade-guidance-removal.plan.json --format json
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section workflow_obligations --format json
uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section closeout_trust --format json
validation_commands.result: pass: surfaced need to record workflow evidence and preserve #478 continuation

completion_criteria: No shipped or installed bootstrap-upgrade guidance tells ordinary host repos to run absent helper scripts.
Upgrade guidance uses root lifecycle first and package-local CLI only as fallback/debugging.
Tests or checks catch future stale helper-script guidance.

execution_run.handoff source: GitHub issue #480 plus refreshed external-intent evidence
execution_run.what happened: Updated installed and package bootstrap-upgrade skill guidance to route ordinary host-repo updates through root agentic-workspace upgrade dry-run/apply/doctor, kept planning package CLI as fallback/debugging, and added a regression test rejecting absent helper-script guidance.
execution_run.scope touched: Bootstrap-upgrade skill docs, planning installer tests, and planning state.
execution_run.validations run: focused and full planning installer tests, planning package ruff, proof selector, doctor, planning surface check, maintainer-surfaces, rg stale-helper sweep, preflight, summary, workflow_obligations, closeout_trust, reconcile.
execution_run.result for continuation: #480 satisfied; #478 remains open with #481-#484 as required continuation.
execution_run.next step: Archive, commit, push, close #480, refresh evidence, and promote #481 unless reingestion reprioritizes.

proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: focused and full planning installer tests, planning package ruff, proof selector, doctor, planning surface check, maintainer-surfaces, rg stale-helper sweep, preflight, summary, workflow_obligations, closeout_trust, reconcile.

finished_run_review.misinterpretation risk: low; generated adapter source-checkout headers are outside ordinary bootstrap-upgrade guidance.

intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: The bounded slice is complete; archive-plan --prepare-closeout generated normalized closeout fields.

closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen when .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml roadmap lane lifecycle-management-hardening activates a fresh bounded slice.
